X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->

Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)

Quotient R'' + Unit <~> Quotient R'

        
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
IsEquiv
  (sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
     (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))))

        
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X

H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
IsConnMap (Tr (-1))
  (sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
     (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))))

R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type

         n =>

H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
forall b : Quotient R',
merely
  (hfiber
     (sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
        (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp)
        (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))))
     b)

          
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
forall a : Fin n.+1,
merely
  (hfiber
     (sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
        (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp)
        (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))))
     (class_of R' a))

          
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y0 : X, Decidable (R x y0)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y0 : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y0)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y0 : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y0)
R'':= fun
  x
   y0 : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
           match n0 with
           | 0 => Empty
           | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
           end)
          n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y0): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y0 : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
         match n0 with
         | 0 => Empty
         | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
         end)
        n,
Decidable (R'' x y0)
inlresp: forall
x
 y0 : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
         match n0 with
         | 0 => Empty
         | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
         end)
        n,
R'' x y0 -> R' (inl x) (inl y0)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
y: Fin n
hfiber
  (sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
     (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))))
  (class_of R' (inl y))

is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->

R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y0 : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y0)
R'':= fun
  x
   y0 : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
           match n0 with
           | 0 => Empty
           | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
           end)
          n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y0): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y0 : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
         match n0 with
         | 0 => Empty
         | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
         end)
        n,
Decidable (R'' x y0)
inlresp: forall
x
 y0 : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
         match n0 with
         | 0 => Empty
         | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
         end)
        n,
R'' x y0 -> R' (inl x) (inl y0)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
y: Fin n
hfiber
  (sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
     (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))))
  (class_of R' (inl y))
 exists (inl (class_of R'' y)); reflexivity.

  (class_of R' (inr tt))
 exists (inr tt); reflexivity.

H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X

H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
u: Quotient R'' + Unit
forall y : Quotient R'' + Unit,
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))) u =
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))) y ->
u = y

X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type

X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
u: Quotient R'' + Unit
forall a : Quotient R'',
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))) u =
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt)))
  (inl a) ->
u = inl a

X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)

u: Quotient R'' + Unit
v: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))) u =
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt)))
  (inl (class_of R'' v)) ->
u = inl (class_of R'' v)

is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
v, u: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
q: class_of R' (inl u) = class_of R' (inl v)
inl (class_of R'' u) = inl (class_of R'' v)

  x

Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

  n
q: class_of R' (inl u) = class_of R' (inl v)
R' (inl u) (inl v)

              exact (related_quotient_paths R' (inl u) (inl v) q).

H0: Finite X

n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->

   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type

X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with

      end)
     n)
  R''

X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
v: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
class_of R' (inr tt) = class_of R' (inl v) -> inr tt = inl (class_of R'' v)

              
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R

IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)

X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
v: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
q: class_of R' (inr tt) = class_of R' (inl v)
inr tt = inl (class_of R'' v)

              
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
v: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
q: R' (inr tt) (inl v)
inr tt = inl (class_of R'' v)

X: Type

H3: Symmetric R

is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
v: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
q: R' (inl v) (inr tt)
inr tt = inl (class_of R'' v)

              elim (np (tr (v ; q))).
          
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
u: Quotient R'' + Unit
forall b : Unit,
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))) u =
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt)))
  (inr b) ->
u = inr b
 
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
u: Quotient R'' + Unit
sum_ind (fun _ : Quotient R'' + Unit => Quotient R')
  (Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp) (unit_name (class_of R' (inr tt))) u =
class_of R' (inr tt) -> u = inr tt

is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)

X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
u: Quotient R''
Quotient_functor R'' R' inl inlresp u = class_of R' (inr tt) ->
inl u = inr tt

         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

x

  x

x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

x

X: Type
H0: Finite X

H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R

is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)

X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'

X2: Symmetric R'

R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->

   end)

Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with

      end)
     n)
  R''

X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=

       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
u: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
q: class_of R' (inl u) = class_of R' (inr tt)
inl (class_of R'' u) = inr tt

              
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
u: (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n
q: R' (inl u) (inr tt)
inl (class_of R'' u) = inr tt

              elim (np (tr (u;q))).
            
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
n: nat
IH: forall R'0 : Fin n -> Fin n -> Type,
is_mere_relation (Fin n) R'0 ->
Reflexive R'0 ->
Symmetric R'0 ->
Transitive R'0 ->
(forall x y : Fin n, Decidable (R'0 x y)) -> Finite (Quotient R'0)
R': Fin n.+1 -> Fin n.+1 -> Type
X0: is_mere_relation (Fin n.+1) R'
X1: Reflexive R'
X2: Symmetric R'
X3: Transitive R'
R'd: forall x y : Fin n.+1, Decidable (R' x y)
R'':= fun
  x
   y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
          match n0 with
          | 0 => Empty
          | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
          end)
         n =>
R' (inl x) (inl y): (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
(fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
   match n0 with
   | 0 => Empty
   | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
   end)
  n ->
Type
X4: is_mere_relation
  ((fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
      match n0 with
      | 0 => Empty
      | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
      end)
     n)
  R''
X5: Reflexive R''
X6: Symmetric R''
X7: Transitive R''
X8: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
Decidable (R'' x y)
inlresp: forall
x
 y : (fix Fin (n0 : nat) : Type0 :=
        match n0 with
        | 0 => Empty
        | n1.+1 => (Fin n1 + Unit)%type
        end)
       n,
R'' x y -> R' (inl x) (inl y)
np: ~ merely {x : Fin n & R' (inl x) (inr tt)}
class_of R' (inr tt) = class_of R' (inr tt) -> inr tt = inr tt
 intros; reflexivity. }
  Defined.

  (** Therefore, the cardinality of [X] is the sum of the cardinalities of its equivalence classes. *)
  
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
fcard X =
finadd
  (fun z : Quotient R =>
   fcard {x : X & (fun x0 : X => trunctype_type (in_class R z x0)) x})

  
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
fcard X =
finadd
  (fun z : Quotient R =>
   fcard {x : X & (fun x0 : X => trunctype_type (in_class R z x0)) x})

    
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
finadd
  (fun y : Quotient R => fcard {x : X & (fun x0 : X => class_of R x0 = y) x}) =
finadd
  (fun z : Quotient R =>
   fcard {x : X & (fun x0 : X => trunctype_type (in_class R z x0)) x})

    
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x y : X, Decidable (R x y)
forall z : Quotient R,
fcard {x : X & (fun x0 : X => class_of R x0 = z) x} =
fcard {x : X & (fun x0 : X => trunctype_type (in_class R z x0)) x}

    
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x0 y : X, Decidable (R x0 y)
x: X
fcard {x0 : X & (fun x1 : X => class_of R x1 = class_of R x) x0} =
fcard {x0 : X & (fun x1 : X => R x x1) x0}

    
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x0 y : X, Decidable (R x0 y)
x: X
{x0 : X & class_of R x0 = class_of R x} <~> {x0 : X & R x x0}

    
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x0 y0 : X, Decidable (R x0 y0)
x, y: X
class_of R y = class_of R x <~> R x y

    
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x0 y0 : X, Decidable (R x0 y0)
x, y: X
R x y <~> class_of R y = class_of R x

    
H: Univalence
X: Type
H0: Finite X
R: Relation X
is_mere_relation0: is_mere_relation X R
H1: Reflexive R
H2: Transitive R
H3: Symmetric R
Rd: forall x0 y0 : X, Decidable (R x0 y0)
x, y: X
R x y <~> R y x

    apply equiv_iff_hprop; apply symmetry.
  Defined.

End DecidableQuotients.

(** ** Injections *)

(** An injection between finite sets induces an inequality between their cardinalities. *)

X, Y: Type
fX: Finite X
fY: Finite Y
f: X -> Y
i: IsEmbedding f
fcard X <= fcard Y


X, Y: Type
fX: Finite X
fY: Finite Y
f: X -> Y
i: IsEmbedding f
fcard X <= fcard Y

fX: Finite X
fY: Finite Y
f: X -> Y
i: IsEmbedding f
X0: MapIn (Tr (-1)) f
fcard X <= fcard Y

fX: Finite X
fY: Finite Y
f: X -> Y
X0: MapIn (Tr (-1)) f
fcard X <= fcard Y

f: X -> Y

n <= fcard Y

i: IsInjective g
h:= (fin_transpose_last_with m (g (inr tt)))^-1 o g: Fin n.+1 -> Fin m.+1
X2: MapIn (Tr (-1)) h
a: Fin n
b: Fin m
p: g (inl a) = inl b
q: g (inr tt) <> inl b
r: h (inl a) = inl b
is_inl (h (inl a))

(** ** Surjections  *)
(** A surjection between finite sets induces an inequality between their cardinalities. *)

X, Y: Type
fX: Finite X
fY: Finite Y
f: X -> Y
i: IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) f
fcard X >= fcard Y


X, Y: Type
fX: Finite X
fY: Finite Y
f: X -> Y
i: IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) f
fcard X >= fcard Y

  
X, Y: Type
n: nat
e: merely (X <~> Fin n)
m: nat
e': merely (Y <~> Fin m)
f: X -> Y
i: IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) f
n >= m

  
X, Y: Type
n: nat
e: merely (X <~> Fin n)
m: nat
e': merely (Y <~> Fin m)
f: X -> Y
i: IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) f
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
n >= m

  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat
f: X -> Y
i: IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) f
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
n >= m

  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat
f: X -> Y
i: IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) f
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g:= e' o f o e^-1: Fin n -> Fin m
n >= m

  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat
f: X -> Y
i: IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) f
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g:= e' o f o e^-1: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g
n >= m

n, m: nat
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g
n >= m

e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g
j: merely {s : Fin m -> Fin n & g o s == idmap}
n >= m

  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g
j: {s : Fin m -> Fin n & (fun x : Fin m => g (s x)) == idmap}
n >= m

  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g
s: Fin m -> Fin n
is_section: (fun x : Fin m => g (s x)) == idmap
n >= m
 
  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat

e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g
s: Fin m -> Fin n
is_section: (fun x : Fin m => g (s x)) == idmap
fcard (Fin n) >= m

  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g

fcard (Fin n) >= fcard (Fin m)

  
X, Y: Type
n, m: nat
k: IsProjective (Fin m)
e': Y <~> Fin m
e: X <~> Fin n
g: Fin n -> Fin m
k': IsConnMap (Tr (-1)) g
s: Fin m -> Fin n
is_section: (fun x : Fin m => g (s x)) == idmap
IsEmbedding s

  apply isembedding_isinj_hset, (isinj_section is_section).
Defined.
  
  (** ** Enumerations *)

(** A function from [nat] to a finite set must repeat itself eventually. *)
Section Enumeration.
  Context `{Funext} {X} `{Finite@{_ Set _} X} (e : nat -> X).

  Let er (n : nat) : Fin n -> X
    := fun k => e (nat_fin n k).

  
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IsEmbedding (er n) + {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}

  
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IsEmbedding (er n) + {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}

    
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
IsEmbedding (er 0) + {n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
IsEmbedding (er n.+1) + {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}
IsEmbedding (er n.+1) + {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}

    
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
IsEmbedding (er 0) + {n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}
 
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
IsEmbedding (er 0)
 
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
x: X
IsHProp (hfiber (er 0) x)

      apply hprop_inhabited_contr; intros [[] _].
    
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
IsEmbedding (er n.+1) + {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}
 
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
k: Fin n
p: er n k = er n.+1 (inr tt)
IsEmbedding (er n.+1) + {n0 : nat & {k0 : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k0).+1}}
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))
IsEmbedding (er n.+1) + {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}

      
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
k: Fin n
p: er n k = er n.+1 (inr tt)
IsEmbedding (er n.+1) + {n0 : nat & {k0 : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k0).+1}}

k: Fin n
p: er n k = er n.+1 (inr tt)
{n0 : nat & {k0 : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k0).+1}}

e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X

H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
k: Fin n
p: er n k = er n.+1 (inr tt)
e (nat_fin n k) = e (nat_fin n k + nat_fin_compl n k).+1

        
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
k: Fin n
p: er n k = er n.+1 (inr tt)
e (nat_fin n k) = e n

        exact p.

H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X

x: X

H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))
x: X
forall x0 y : hfiber (er n.+1) x, x0 = y

        
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))
x: X
k, l: hfiber (er n.+1) x
k = l

H0: Finite X

er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X

x: X

H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))
x: X
k: Fin n
p: er n.+1 (inl k) = x
l: Fin n
q: er n.+1 (inl l) = x
inl k = inl l

H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsInjective (er n)
ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))
x: X
k: Fin n
p: e (nat_fin n k) = x
l: Fin n
q: e (nat_fin n l) = x
er n k = er n l

          exact (p @ q^).
        
H: Funext
X: Type

e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k0 : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k0): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X

ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))

inl k = inr tt

H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))
x: X
p: er n.+1 (inr tt) = x
l: Fin n
q: er n.+1 (inl l) = x
er n l = er n.+1 (inr tt)

          exact (q @ p^).
        
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: IsEmbedding (er n)
ne: ~ hfiber (er n) (er n.+1 (inr tt))
x: X
p, q: er n.+1 (inr tt) = x
inr tt = inr tt
 reflexivity.
    
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n0 : nat) (k : Fin n0) => e (nat_fin n0 k): forall n0 : nat, Fin n0 -> X
n: nat
IH: {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}
IsEmbedding (er n.+1) + {n0 : nat & {k : nat & e n0 = e (n0 + k).+1}}
 right; exact IH.
  Defined.

  
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
{n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}

H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
{n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}

    
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
p: IsEmbedding (er (fcard X).+1)
{n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
s: {n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}
{n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}

    
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
p: IsEmbedding (er (fcard X).+1)
{n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}
 
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
p: IsEmbedding (er (fcard X).+1)
q: (fcard X).+1 <= fcard X
{n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}

      elim (lt_irrefl _ q).
    
H: Funext
X: Type
H0: Finite X
e: nat -> X
er:= fun (n : nat) (k : Fin n) => e (nat_fin n k): forall n : nat, Fin n -> X
s: {n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}
{n : nat & {k : nat & e n = e (n + k).+1}}
 assumption.
  Defined.

End Enumeration.
